description: A detailed Venetian canal scene. A narrow canal recedes into the distance, flanked by tall buildings on both sides. At the far end, a church facade with a bell tower is visible. Gondolas and small boats line the canal. Figures walk along the fondamenta (canal-side walkway) at left. The sky is pale and hazy. The palette is soft with warm greys, ochres, and touches of red from buildings and boats. The painting has the luminous, atmospheric quality of 19th-century Venetian vedute.
